description: Bootstrappable Base Harness Adoption Kit. An agent reads these in order to stand up the harness on a new repo or migrate an existing one to v3.0.0, then verify + emit an adoption bolt. A spoke behind on teachings levels up by running THIS kit once (idempotent), not by adopting N stale teachings.
source_of_truth: framework:templates/harness-base/ — hub/teachings_repo/spoke/base/ receives a copy via the distribution path (Stream E)
note: Only the current base lives here. Cutting a new base replaces this folder wholesale.
